prompt: Generate my performance review for the last 12 months. I'm an engineer and I want to see a full breakdown of what I shipped across all my repos and orgs.
assertions: Skill checks gh auth status before proceeding
Skill runs generate_report.py to gather GitHub data
Output markdown file named performance-review-YYYY.md exists
Markdown contains an Executive Summary section
Markdown contains a Major Projects section grouped by repo/theme
Markdown contains a Technical Contributions section
Markdown contains Self-Assessment Prompts with open-ended questions
HTML file named performance-review-YYYY.html exists and is non-empty
HTML has a hero header with user name and period
